case_title: SPAIN, JOHN L. VS MARLTON MANOR, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARLTON MANOR, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,267.84 FILED BY SPAIN, JOHN L. AS TO DEFENDANT MARLTON MANOR, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPAIN, JOHN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARLTON MANOR, INC. $1,267.84 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,282.84, CLAIM IS AMENDED TO SUBSTITURE DEFENDANT, MARLTON MANOR, INC, IN PLACE OF GARY SAHM, MANAGER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MARLTON MANOR, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPAIN, JOHN L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARLTON MANOR, INC. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24182 ON 1-17-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT MARLTON MANOR, INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24182, RECORD TRANSFERRED
